steps.title: Find the intercept
steps.content:
The $y$-intercept is the value of the function when $x=0$.
$$
f(0)=-4(0)+36=36
$$

steps.title: Interpret the input
steps.content: Here, $x$ is the number of mugs decorated. So $x=0$ means Jordan has not decorated any mugs yet.

steps.title: Match the context
steps.content: The intercept means Jordan had about $36$ fluid ounces of paint at the start. The answer is C.
